intro: Senecio palmatilobus, commonly known as the Palmate Senecio or Leafy Groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its purported anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The bioactive constituents of Senecio palmatilobus include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are believed to contribute to its therapeutic effects. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant are infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
